title: Cache Memory Mapping Functions Flowchart
description: This flowchart illustrates the process a CPU follows to locate data in a cache using different mapping techniques (Direct, Associative, Set-Associative), and the resulting actions on a hit or miss.
relationships: CPU sends address to Cache Controller
Controller uses Mapping Function to check cache
If Hit, data is sent to CPU
If Miss, data is fetched from Main Memory and loaded into cache (possibly replacing existing data)
